title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York / Tel Aviv (Global, B2B SaaS)
description: Reporting to the CRO, the Head of Revenue Operations builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Involves collaborating with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ. A strategic leader-doer who can own executive strategy while building flows, dashboards, and data models.
score_reason: Omri is a near-perfect match—15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps exceeds the 7+ requirement, has proven scaling experience well beyond $30M ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance aligns perfectly. Tel Aviv HQ location is ideal for his geographic preferences.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and immediately thought of you—scaling a GTM engine from the RevOps side is exactly where your 15+ years in B2B SaaS and Salesforce mastery shine. With your track record scaling operations beyond $30M+ ARR and building strategic dashboards that drive cross-functional alignment, you'd be uniquely positioned to build Finout's operational backbone while working closely with their Tel Aviv HQ. The role seems designed for someone who can own both the strategic vision and the execution—your exact wheelhouse.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations

Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations or Sales Strategy, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), and Salesforce proficiency.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with deep Salesforce expertise directly aligns with this role's core requirements. Territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, and data-driven GTM optimization are core competencies that match perfectly.

Your focus on data-driven territory design and seller productivity acceleration resonates with work I've done optimizing territory composition and forecasting pipelines at scale—I'd love to explore how I can accelerate that mission.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo is an AI research platform used by brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange. As GTM Engineer you'll replace patchwork SaaS tools and manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered automations that compound over time. Expect to build lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines that work, activation flows, and AI agents that eliminate manual work. You should be able to code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations to make the GTM team dangerously effective during 20x revenue scaling.

Best fit if Omri has technical chops or appetite to learn.
